errorCode.msg: Impossible to transfer Reason for failure : {0}
Receiving accounts can only available for transaction account.

[Transfer failure]The transfer amount is re-deposited to the withdrawal bank or deposited into the your SC transaction account. It can take up to two business days, please refer to Customer Contact Center (1588-1599)

Impossible to transfer Reason for failure : {0} (Balance that can be withdrawal {1} won.)
Impossible to transfer from other banks' account. please check it's a normal account. {0}
The Receiving account can not use the service. Reason for failure : {0}
